title: mentha × piperita var. crispa
intro: Mentha × piperita var. crispa, also known as pineapple mint or bergamot mint, is a variety of peppermint that is characterized by its distinctive, pineapple-like aroma and flavor. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, alleviate headaches, and calm the nervous system due to its high concentration of menthol and other volatile oils. The health benefits of Mentha × piperita var. crispa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
